title: Mistbound Lane B tick 4 standby
body: Lane B Tranche 1 landed at c4bacfc5. No cycle in flight. Tranche 2 deferred: ADR-182 T2 awaits first-instance evidence; ADR-183 T2 awaits Shadeds pre-Cycle-6 sidebar opener. Standing by for owner direction or peer signal. Cron cadence */3 holds. Context budget ~60 percent.
